c49d27af6f63a354.description: The Hijacked Sedan — The armored back-and-front cabin of a black luxury sedan, dashboard screens glowing an eerie blue, rain streaking the sealed windows, a locked partition between the front and back seats., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

97a2127c1e28c5cc.description: The Fitting Room — a cramped bridal-shop back room after closing hours, one bare bulb swinging over pin cushions and fabric scraps, the wedding dress glowing white on its mannequin while three angled mirrors throw the scene back at itself., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

72f821a6524bf947.description: The Bridal Suite — a sunlit hotel room on the wedding morning, a garment bag and bouquet waiting on the made bed, a vanity mirror ringed with half-used makeup and a phone screen glowing face-up between two untouched coffee cups., ambient background loop, continuous atmosphere, no music, no voices, no sudden events

449c9054cbc07aca.description: Small grocery store closed for the night, family still inside: a steady low hum of refrigerated cases now the only bright sound in a dim store, distant muffled street outside grown quiet, a faint electrical hum from dimmed overhead lights, an uneasy stillness with no customer noise. Quiet, close, steady, tense hush., seamless continuous background ambience loop, steady room tone, no music, no voices, no speech, no discrete events, no sudden bangs
